title: Fix admin access to view appointment requests and feedback

requirements.text: Fix the backend query so that the admin can retrieve all appointment requests. Ensure the appointment listing function returns all appointments (including pending ones) when called by an authenticated admin, and that the access control check correctly identifies admin callers.

quotes: give access to admin to view appointment request and feedback

acceptanceCriteria: Admin can call the appointment listing backend function and receive all submitted appointment requests including pending ones.
Non-admin callers cannot access the full appointment list.
No authorization errors are thrown for a properly authenticated admin when fetching appointments.

requirements.text: Fix the backend query so that the admin can retrieve all feedback submissions. Ensure the feedback listing function returns all feedback entries (including unapproved/pending ones) when called by an authenticated admin, and that the access control check correctly identifies admin callers.

quotes: give access to admin to view appointment request and feedback

acceptanceCriteria: Admin can call the feedback listing backend function and receive all feedback submissions.
Non-admin callers cannot access the full feedback list.
No authorization errors are thrown for a properly authenticated admin when fetching feedback.

requirements.text: Fix the admin dashboard frontend so that the Appointments tab correctly fetches and displays all appointment requests from the backend. Ensure the React Query hook used for listing appointments passes the correct admin credentials/actor and handles loading, empty, and error states gracefully.
acceptanceCriteria: After logging in as admin, the Appointments tab in AdminDashboard.tsx shows all submitted appointment requests.
Pending appointment requests are visible and not filtered out.
A loading state is shown while fetching and an appropriate message is shown if there are no appointments.
No blank screen or silent failure occurs when the admin views the Appointments tab.

requirements.text: Fix the admin dashboard frontend so that the Feedback tab correctly fetches and displays all feedback submissions from the backend. Ensure the React Query hook used for listing feedback passes the correct admin credentials/actor and handles loading, empty, and error states gracefully.

quotes: still can't view appointment request and feedback

acceptanceCriteria: After logging in as admin, the Feedback tab in AdminDashboard.tsx shows all submitted feedback entries including unapproved ones.
A loading state is shown while fetching and an appropriate message is shown if there are no feedback entries.
No blank screen or silent failure occurs when the admin views the Feedback tab.

constraints: Do not change the public-facing appointment booking or feedback submission flows.
Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Admin authentication mechanism must remain unchanged.
nonGoals: Adding new admin features beyond viewing appointments and feedback.
Changing the visual design or layout of the admin dashboard.
Modifying the public home page or contact page.
